reference_policy: reference[0] is not used as gold; it remains a difficulty signal only.

failure_records.selected_evidence_text: No further seizures have occurred since.
Overall, I am encouraged by the trajectory; he is clinically stable and functionally improving, with no further events since July 2019.
Given that there have been no further episodes in the past month and his epilepsy is otherwise stable, I do not think additional intervention is required at present.
Considering that he has now been free of seizures for three weeks and his overall condition is stable, no immediate action is necessary.
Since adopting structured reminders in late August, she has had no further events and has taken all doses on time.

decision.rationale: G4 reached 80.0% canonical monthly and 80.0% pragmatic accuracy, below the best same-slice G2 baselines (92.0% monthly, 100.0% pragmatic).
